predictions.forecast_value: Depressed in Q1 (potentially Q2), robust recovery in H2
predictions.source_quote: Our expectation, therefore, is that activity in developed economies will remain depressed in the first quarter of the year, and potentially the second. However, from the second half we could see a meaningful bounce in activity, once the vaccines are rolled out.

predictions.forecast_value: Negative interest rates and ongoing asset purchases continue
predictions.source_quote: Structural inflation challenges in Europe and Japan suggest negative interest rates and ongoing asset purchases are likely to continue through 2021 at least.
